title: Versus the Family Dog
description: You challenged the family dog to a race across the living room. Loss disputed. Rematch demanded.

choices.flavor: The dog won. You refuse to accept the results. The race was unfair. Four legs is cheating.

choices.text: Chase the dog around the yard instead
choices.flavor: The race becomes a pursuit. The dog thinks it is a game. You think it is training.

title: Throwing Contest
description: You turn everything into a throwing contest. Balls, toys, shoes, the remote.

choices.text: Throw as far as possible. Distance matters.
choices.flavor: The remote clears the couch. New personal record. Dad is not impressed.
The laundry basket is the goal. You hit it one out of ten times. Progress.

title: Made-Up Game Meltdown
description: You invented a game with your own rules. You still lost. This is unacceptable.

choices.text: Change the rules so you win retroactively
choices.flavor: Actually the floor is lava now and you were the only one not touching it. You win.

choices.text: Knock everything over and storm off
choices.flavor: Full tantrum. Blocks everywhere. But you come back in three minutes ready to play again.

title: The 'Mine' Phase
description: You say 'mine' to objects that are clearly not yours. The park bench. Another kid's snack. A bird.

choices.flavor: The sandbox is yours. The slide is yours. Territorial instincts strong.
You give back the shovel. Reluctantly. Growth is slow.
